title: Software Engineer(Elastic Search or any enterprise observability tools Prometheus/Grafana Cloud/On prem Observability Azure/AWS/GCP advanced concepts Kubernetes, Linux and Docker DevOps advanced Agentic AI fundamentals)
company_focus:
Critical communications and video security technologies for
public safety
description:
Company Overview

At Motorola Solutions, we believe that everything starts
with our people. We’re a global close-knit community, united
by the relentless pursuit to help keep people safer
everywhere. Our critical communications, video security and
command center technologies support public safety agencies
and enterprises alike, enabling the coordination that’s
critical for safer communities, safer schools, safer
hospitals and safer businesses. Connect with a career that
matters, and help us build a safer future.

Department OverviewThe Core Platform and Services (CPS) team
is responsible for the development and operations of
critical cloud infrastructure and platform services, in
support of Motorola Solutions public and hybrid cloud-based
Software as a Service (SaaS) solutions for public safety
customers. This team is part of Motorola Solutions Software
Enterprise division, which offers secure, reliable and
efficient team communications, workflow and operational
intelligence solutions for mission critical public safety
and enterprise markets throughout the world. Job Description

The Core Platform and Services (CPS) team is responsible
for:

- Design and implementation of the continuous
  integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipeline into
  multiple public cloud regions
- Development and operation of common platform services that
  can be leveraged by our SaaS solutions moving forward
- Overall reliability and security of these services and the
  environments they are run in
- Monitoring and support for these platform and infrastructure
  services, as well as metrics collection and reporting
  related to them

As a Software Engineer on this team, you will be responsible
to develop services, tools, and processes to support other
Motorola Solutions' engineering teams as well as deliver
solutions to our customers. You will be working on a high-
velocity, results-oriented team that leverages cutting-edge
technologies and techniques. The right individual will be
motivated and will have a passion for automation, deployment
processes and enabling innovation. Your efforts will help to
shape the engineering culture and best practices across
Motorola Solutions’  Video & Services organization. Basic
Requirements: Responsibilities will include:

- Aid the team in design, and development of custom software
  solutions utilizing the Elastic Stack and Kubernetes on
  Azure.
- Operation of an Elasticsearch cluster, Prometheus cluster
  used by our services
- Working with fellow developers with automation tools and
  services to minimize delivery time and increase developer
  productivity.
- On-call work is required for services developed by the team

Qualifications:

Must have:

- BS or MS in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a
  related field with 5+ years of professional experience
  respectively
- Proven experience with Elastic, Prometheus, and other
  observability tools
- Strong conceptual understanding of Kubernetes, Linux and
  docker fundamentals
- Proven track record of working with cloud native or
  enterprise grade monitoring systems (New Relic, Data dog,
  Dynatrace etc.)
- Strong understanding of cloud systems architecture and
  infrastructure
- Experience with scripting (e.g., Python, Bash)
- Experience with containerization technologies (e.g.,
  Kubernetes, Docker, Podman, MicroShift)
- Excellent problem solving skills and the ability to work
  under pressure
- Strong communication and collaboration skills
- Expertise in building high scale systems
- Strong level of curiosity and interest to learn

Good to have:

- Knowledge of security best practices
- Experience with performance tuning and capacity planning
- Good understanding of CI/CD frameworks
- Certification in relevant observability tools
- Certification in Kubernetes is a plus

Preferred Qualifications

- A background in Linux/Unix Administration
- Prior experience being on-call for services developed by the
  team
- Demonstrated experience developing and deploying services on
  Microsoft Azure

Primary Skills

- Observability Tools (ELK Stack, Prometheus)
- Server Side Language - Java Preferred
- Linux Administration and Shell Scripting
- Kubernetes and Docker
- Azure Pipelines - YML
- Azure Cloud Services such as Azure Event Hub, Active
  Directory, Enterprise Apps etc
- CI/CD
- Git

Nice to have Skills:

- Azure DevOps
- Front end Development - Angular
- Databases
- Python
- Having AZ 204, AZ 305, CLF C02 (AWS), GCP PCA are nice to
  have

Basic Requirements

Must have:

- BS or MS in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a
  related field with 5+ years of professional experience
  respectively
- Proven experience with Elastic, Prometheus, and other
  observability tools
- Strong understanding of cloud systems architecture and
  infrastructure
- Experience with scripting (e.g., Python, Bash)
- Experience with containerization technologies (e.g.,
  Kubernetes, Docker, Podman, MicroShift)
- Excellent problem solving skills and the ability to work
  under pressure
- Strong communication and collaboration skills
- Expertise in building high scale systems
- Strong level of curiosity and interest to learn

Good to have:

- Knowledge of security best practices
- Experience with performance tuning and capacity planning
- Good understanding of CI/CD frameworks
- Certification in relevant observability tools
- Certification in Red Hat ecosystem or Kubernetes is a plus

Travel RequirementsNone Relocation ProvidedNone Position
TypeExperienced

Referral Payment PlanYes

EEO Statement

Motorola Solutions is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All
qualified applicants will receive consideration for
employment without regard to race, color, religion or
belief, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national
origin, disability, veteran status or any other legally-
protected characteristic.

We are proud of our people-first and community-focused
culture, empowering every Motorolan to be their most
authentic self and to do their best work to deliver on the
promise of a safer world. If you’d like to join our team but
feel that you don’t quite meet all of the preferred skills,
we’d still love to hear why you think you’d be a great
addition to our team.
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines across multiple public cloud regions
Develop and operate common platform services for SaaS solutions
Build custom software solutions using Elastic Stack and Kubernetes on Azure
Operate Elasticsearch and Prometheus clusters used by services
Support automation tools and services to minimize delivery time and increase developer productivity
Ensure overall reliability and security of platform services and environments
Monitor and support platform services with metrics collection and reporting
use_cases: Cloud infrastructure management for public safety SaaS solutions
Observability and monitoring for mission-critical communications systems
Platform services enabling secure and reliable team communications
CI/CD pipeline automation for multi-cloud SaaS deployment
Enterprise-grade monitoring and metrics collection infrastructure
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a platform/infrastructure role focused on
observability tools (Elastic Stack, Prometheus), CI/CD
pipelines, and cloud infrastructure for supporting other
engineering teams. The title mentions "Agentic AI
fundamentals" as a nice-to-have, but the core
responsibilities are infrastructure development, monitoring,
and platform services - working NEAR AI/ML systems rather
than directly building or deploying them.
